eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Washington; at 3:47 PM on MAR 20, 2019 Effective until 4:47 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This an activation of the Amber Alert System.  The Nampa Idaho Police Department is looking for a missing and possibly endangered child last seen in Hermiston,OR.  The child's name is Alissa Helmandollar.  She is a 10 year old white female, 4 feet 10 inches tall, weighing 80 pounds, with brown hair, brown eyes and unknown clothing.  She may be in the company of Brooke A. Helmandollar, a 41 year old white female, 5 feet 4 inches tall, weighing 125 pounds, with brown hair, hazel eyes and unknown clothing.  They are believed to be traveling in a silver 2018 Nissan Sentra, Idaho license plate 1A909DF. If anyone sees these persons or vehicle, please contact a local law enforcement agency with the location. If anyone has any tips related to this Amber Alert, please contact the Nampa Police Department at 208-465-2206 or dial 911.
